Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The Studium
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals, shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, an optional overlay, and a preview Studium Crafters workflow. Use /thestudium to open the window.
Changelog:
Studium Crafters queue:
- Adds a visual queue so multiple crafting lists can be planned together.
- Gives each queued list its own Gear, Accessories, and Tools / Weapon controls.
- Aggregates duplicate finished items before material calculation, FC chest withdrawal, and Artisan handoff.
